name: UnCorreoTemporal
description: Disposable email MCP server for autonomous AI agents. Create labeled temporary inboxes, wait for verification emails, extract OTP codes and confirmation links — zero human intervention required.

tools.name: create_signup_inbox
tools.description: Creates a labeled temporary inbox for a given service. Returns the email address to use for registration.

tools.name: wait_for_verification_email
tools.description: Auto-polls until a verification email arrives (no manual polling needed). Returns the full email once received.

tools.name: get_latest_email
tools.description: Reads the latest email in the inbox with full body (text + HTML).

tools.name: extract_otp_code
tools.description: Extracts OTP code (4–8 digits) from a message body.

tools.name: extract_verification_link
tools.description: Extracts verification or confirmation link from a message body.
